Text.Page:
There is some sort of...infection...forming inside the Rift. An abscess, if you will. We tried to repair it, but there are things in there—things that seem to be feeding off the infection. We lost an entire platoon to them, just trying to get a closer look.

If these things leave the Rift, they'll overrun our village in no time at all. We need your help to stop them.

Please make the journey to Fyrmount and purge these horrific things at their source.

Thank you for all your help.

Please take this, as a small token of our appreciation.
